quick_skim.title: Plug-and-Play Consistency Models for MIMO Channel Estimation
quick_skim.abstract: Consistency models (CMs) learn a consistent mapping from multiple noise levels to the data endpoint and can therefore perform generative inference in one or a few steps. This property makes them attractive as learned priors for low-latency inverse problems. Multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) channel estimation under limited pilot overhead can be formulated as a high-dimensional linear inverse problem with an explicit measurement matrix, where data consistency alone is often insufficient for stable angular-domain channel recovery. This paper applies the plug-and-play consistency model (PnP-CM) framework to pilot-aided MIMO channel estimation. The PnP-CM inference procedure enforces the pilot observation model in the data-consistency update and invokes a pretrained CM denoiser in the prior update, thereby recovering the angular-domain channel vector within a small number of outer iterations. Preliminary experiments validate the feasibility of using CMs as low-latency channel-estimation priors and show that adaptive parameter scheduling and cross-scenario robustness remain important directions for further improvement.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: MIMO channel estimation using plug-and-play consistency models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用即插即用一致性模型的MIMO信道估计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用即插即用一致性模型的MIMO信道估计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用即插即用一致性模型的MIMO信道估计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Applies consistency models to MIMO channel estimation for stable angular-domain recovery under limited overhead.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 将一致性模型应用于MIMO信道估计，在有限开销下实现稳定的角域恢复。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 将一致性模型应用于MIMO信道估计，在有限开销下实现稳定的角域恢复。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: High speed channel characterization for SerDes and HBM interfaces

quick_skim.title: FlowPlace: Flow Matching for Chip Placement
quick_skim.abstract: Chip placement plays an important role in physical design. While generative models like diffusion models offer promising learning-based solutions, current methods have the following limitations: they use random synthetic data for pre-training, require long sampling times, and often result in overlaps due to their dependence on gradient-based solvers during the sampling process. To overcome these issues, we propose FlowPlace, which features mask-guided synthetic data generation, flow-based efficient training with flexible prior injection, and hard constraint sampling for overlap-free layouts. Experiments on OpenROAD and ICCAD 2015 benchmarks show FlowPlace achieves better PPA metrics, 10-50$\times$ faster sampling efficiency, and zero overlaps.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Generative AI for chip placement optimization in physical design
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于物理设计中芯片布局优化的生成式人工智能
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于物理设计中芯片布局优化的生成式人工智能
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于物理设计中芯片布局优化的生成式人工智能
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces FlowPlace, a flow-matching generative model for efficient and overlap-free chip placement.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 引入FlowPlace，一种用于高效且无重叠芯片布局的流匹配生成模型。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 引入FlowPlace，一种用于高效且无重叠芯片布局的流匹配生成模型。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 板级、封装级、芯片级信号完整性与电源完整性（SI/PI）相关论文检索，涵盖高速互连、建模、PDN优化及机器学习应用。, especially work that connects or combines: Power integrity and PDN modeling optimization; Signal integrity analysis for high-speed interconnects; SerDes DDR and HBM channel modeling and simulation; PDN impedance modeling and decoupling capacitor design; SI/PI analysis for 2.5D 3D and Chiplet packaging; Machine learning methods for SI/PI analysis and optimization; Advanced modeling and optimization techniques for SI/PI in high speed systems; Machine learning applications for signal and power integrity analysis; SI/PI challenges and solutions for Chiplet and 3D heterogeneous integration; High speed channel characterization for SerDes and HBM interfaces.
